Video.summary: Anthoney wants to be a father to his child, but he wants nothing to do with the one-night-stand mother; Deja had sex with her friend's boyfriend and now wants him for herself; Derrick and Haven have confessions to make.
Video.title: Dodging Divorce

Video.summary: Felicia is here to confront her boyfriend and her mother who have been sleeping together for months! Next Susan must come clean to her boyfriend and tell him she's prostituting again!
Video.title: Brawlin' Broads!

Video.summary: Sarah's here for Jonathan. The only problem is Lana, her best friend, who just happens to be Jonathan's girlfriend. Next Kung-fu family feud! David's here to let his brother, Lil Wayne, know that he has been sleeping with his girlfriend Ashley.
Video.title: Kung Fu Hillbilly!

Video.summary: Kitty came to the show to pose nude for our audience and a camera man while "fooling around" with her friend, Naomi! Next Gee is here to finally get even with her sister, Jenny, for sleeping with her man.
Video.title: Naughty Girls

Video.summary: These guests say they are willing to betray family and friends in their quest to find a lover.
Video.title: Angry Lovers Attack!!

Video.summary: Arvonda says her fiance can't satisfy her and treats her badly. She'll tell him that she's been sleeping with his best friend, Mike! Next When Teresa's boyfriend asked her to have a threesome, she had no idea he was having an ongoing affair!
Video.title: Leave It To Springer!

Video.summary: Iris threw her husband, Wayne, out of the house during a fight, but she never expected he would find a new love so soon. She will confront her husband's new lover, Janie, a woman born with no hands and no feet.
Video.title: You Can't Tear Us Apart!

Video.summary: Stephanie's very suspicious that fiance Ryan has been cheating because he comes home reeking of body spray. Then Whisky business! After getting rejected in a proposal to his girlfriend, Bob polished off a bottle of whisky with her mother.
Video.title: Busted...On Bended Knee

Video.summary: Gail needs more excitement in her life so shes been sleeping with her boyfriend's best friend! Next Dave finds out that his girlfriend of 3 years is having an affair. He says he's willing to do anything to get her back; even wear her bra!
Video.title: Freaky Sex Stories

Video.summary: Bailey says she's proud that she's a prostitute but her boyfriend isn’t. Next Tina learns how her man, Lewis, is earning his income. Then..."Blimp the Pimp" is here today to tell his girlfriend that he wants her to go to work for him.
Video.title: Baby, I'm A Hooker

Video.summary: For the past 5 years, Trisha has been having a secret affair with her mother's boyfriend, Don! Next Daniel regrets the day he agreed to a threesome because now he's about to lose his fiancee forever.
Video.title: Mom, I'm Marrying Your Man!

Video.summary: Morgan literally dumps his fiancé at the altar for his secret lover, Victor! Next, John is leaving his fiancé, Jamie, now that his ex-wife wants him back! Later Dave is furious with his niece because she is engaged to a man of a different race.
Video.title: Outrageous Wedding Confessions

Video.summary: Cooda's tells his girlfriend that their relationship is over because he's gay and he's running off with a male lover! Then Kathy has always been fond of sharing with best friend Cindy, but that never included Cindy's husband Marquis!
Video.title: You Cheated...So Beat It

Video.summary: A man impregnates his girlfriend's cousin.
Video.title: Steve & A Pregnant Girl

Video.summary: Steve helps a pregnant prostitute change her lifestyle.
Video.title: Update: Steve & The Pregnant Hooker

Video.summary: A woman is ready to give up nine years of marriage; a woman confronts her husband and his Internet lover.
Video.title: 7 Kids, a Trucker & Waffles

Video.summary: Shianne confronts the stripper she says is destroying her marriage; stripper Candy wants a threesome with her two female co-workers.
Video.title: Springer Strip Off

Video.summary: Becca wants to rekindle her relationship with her ex, who has a pregnant new girlfriend; best friends Cory, Jess and Juan find themselves in a love triangle; siblings Keimo and Keke learn that their significant others have hooked up.
Video.title: You're Pregnant by Him, but It Should Be Me

Image.alt: You're Pregnant by Him, but It Should Be Me
You're Pregnant by Him, but It Should Be Me
You're Pregnant by Him, but It Should Be Me

Video.summary: Alex refuses to lose his ex-girlfriend without a fight; CeeCee needs to reveal her true identity to her online crush; Kyle and his sister have secrets to confess.
Video.title: You're Not Man Enough

Video.summary: Jordan admits that he has not been faithful to his girlfriend; Shay confesses that she has shared a lot with her best friend; Trisha learns that her fiance slept with her friend again.
Video.title: Bitter BFFs

Video.summary: Lisa's husband, Mickey, moved his mistress into their house 3 months ago! Then LaTasha's boyfriend, Maurice, has been cheating with transsexual Day Day! Maurice says it's over with Day Day, but much to his surprise, LaTasha won't take him back!
Video.title: Heartless Affairs!

Video.summary: Guests feel they have been keeping secrets way too long on today’s Jerry Springer Show.
Video.title: I Need To Tell You This

Image.alt: I Need To Tell You This
I Need To Tell You This
I Need To Tell You This

Video.summary: Lisa won’t sign for a divorce after her husband left. Then, Damyen confronts the man who stole his girlfriend!
Video.title: Love Affairs Disasters

Video.summary: Shayla and Chanelle return with their friend to help her reveal to her boyfriend a long kept secret.
Video.title: Attack of the Springer Guests

Video.summary: Andrew is playing both Tabitha and Courtney. Donna betrayed Bethany by sleeping with her boyfriend.
Video.title: Teen Moms Do Battle

Video.summary: Willy used to be a cheating dog, but now his girlfriend has turned the tables on him.
Video.title: Marriage Disasters

Video.summary: Lisa says she can't stand the constant interference by her boyfriend's ex, Sarah.
Video.title: Lovers vs. Mistresses

Video.summary: "Psychic Lover" is a phony psychic who convinces women to start having affairs with him
Video.title: I've Been Bed-Hopping

Video.summary: Alley and Jessica have a threesome with Nneka’s man Matt. Now Nneka’s here to get her revenge. Then, Jordan reveals to his girlfriend Cassandra that he may not be all the man she thinks he is. Plus more stories of relationships gone wild.
Video.title: Threesomes With My Sister

Video.summary: They say you never forget your first time well these guests are here to live out their unforgettable first-time fantasies.
Video.title: First-Time Fantasies

Video.summary: Carla has been cheating on her man with his best friend and his sister! Next Yvonne will tell her friend, Marie, that she's been sleeping with her boyfriend. Then Mary Sue and her secret lover, Cory, are here to confront Mary Sue's boyfriend, Scott.
Video.title: Honey, I'm Leaving You!

Video.summary: Desiree and Kim have been dating the same man, Chango, for 6 years! Next Mark's ex-girlfriend wants him back and even lied to him and told him she was pregnant. Today she will be confronted by Mark and his new girlfriend!
Video.title: I've Had Enough…It's Over!

Video.summary: Regina tells her daughter, Angela, that she is getting married to her ex-boyfriend! Next Suzanne is tired of her boyfriend complaining about her job as an exotic entertainer. Then Tanya is here to tell Bryan's wife about their affair.
Video.title: My Mom's Marrying My Man!
